allow: PowerShell(Remove-Item Env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\("ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE", $null, "User"\); [System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\("ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE", $null, "Machine"\); Write-Host "Cleared. Current value:" $env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE)

PowerShell(Write-Host "User level:" \([System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE", "User"\)\); Write-Host "Machine level:" \([System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE", "Machine"\)\); Write-Host "Current session:" $env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE)
